resume_before:
Naisha Rajesh Shetty
naisha9970@gmail.com | +91 9741801830 | linkedin.com/in/naisha-shetty | github.com/NaishaShetty
Professional Summary
Computer Science Engineering undergraduate with hands-on experience building production-grade AI systems
and backend services. Experienced in Python-based system design, machine learning, REST API development, and
model deployment using PyTorch, FastAPI, SQL, React, and Docker. Seeking Software Engineering / AI Internships
focused on scalable systems and applied machine learning.
Technical Skills
Languages: Python, SQL, C++, Java
Machine Learning: Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Model Evaluation
Frameworks: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn
Backend: FastAPI, Flask, Django, REST APIs
Frontend: React.js, JavaScript, HTML, CSS
Databases: PostgreSQL, SQLite
Tools & Platforms: Git, GitHub, Docker, Linux, Bash, CI/CD, Postman, CUDA
Concepts: System Design, Model Deployment, Data Pipelines
Experience
Software Engineer Intern (AI Systems)
Sept 2025 – Present
Redinium Technologies Pvt Ltd
• Designed and implemented a scalable autonomous systems platform integrating hardware detection, real-time
telemetry ingestion, configuration management, and system health monitoring.
• Built an AI-assisted failure analysis and decision-support layer to detect recurring faults and handle
low-confidence operational states safely.
• Developed a failure-aware learning framework that tracked historical error patterns across inference runs,
improving robustness under repeated failure conditions.
• Architected and implemented an end-to-end system, including backend services, AI logic, data pipelines, and
embedded systems integration.
AI Intern
June 2025 – Sept 2025
Ability Stack
• Built and deployed an AI-powered interview automation system using conversational AI, voice agents, and
prompt engineering.
• Designed AI agent behavior for dynamic question generation, candidate response analysis, and role-specific
interview flows.
• Improved dialogue coherence and system realism through iterative prompt and flow optimization.
Projects
AI Abstention Engine
Feb 2026
GitHub | Live Demo
• Built a production-grade AI abstention system using PyTorch and FastAPI to dynamically route predictions
between proceed, review, and abstain actions.
• Implemented a persistent risk-memory mechanism with exponential decay to model repeated failure patterns
over time.
• Developed a React-based monitoring dashboard for real-time risk metrics and system observability.
Network Intrusion Detection System
2025 – 2026
GitHub | Live Demo
• Trained machine learning models on the NSL-KDD dataset to detect malicious network traffic patterns.
• Integrated probability calibration and concept drift monitoring to maintain detection performance under
evolving data distributions.
OCR and Computer Vision Pipeline
Oct 2025
GitHub
• Developed an end-to-end OCR pipeline using OpenCV and deep learning models for image and video text
extraction.
• Optimized preprocessing and post-processing stages to improve accuracy and throughput.
Certifications
Tata Group – GenAI Powered Data Analytics Job Simulation (Forage)
Jan 2026
Goldman Sachs – Operations Job Simulation (Forage)
Jan 2026

jd:
Software Engineering Intern (AI/ML)
We're building production AI infrastructure and are looking for a CS undergraduate with hands-on experience in Python, machine learning, and backend systems. You'll work on REST API development with FastAPI or Flask, integrate PyTorch-based ML models into scalable pipelines, and contribute to system design and deployment using Docker and CI/CD. Experience with NLP, model evaluation, or real-time data pipelines is a strong plus. React experience for internal dashboards is a bonus.

jd:
iOS Mobile Developer Intern
We're looking for a mobile-first engineer to build and ship features in our consumer iOS app. You'll work primarily in Swift and SwiftUI, integrate with RESTful APIs, and collaborate closely with our design team on pixel-perfect UI. Experience with Xcode, Core Data, and Apple's Human Interface Guidelines is required. Familiarity with Objective-C, ARKit, or TestFlight deployment pipelines is a plus. Prior App Store shipping experience preferred.
